## Micron and Intel fall as much as 8% amid SK Hynix earnings jitters; sector-wide chip selloff broadens

An SK Hynix miss propagating declines of up to 8% across Micron and Intel illustrates how tightly the market reads HBM supply chain health as a sector bellwether — differentiated fundamental views on each name are likely to be overwhelmed by the macro semi tape in the near term.

- Micron and Intel declined as much as 8%, per the headline, with SK Hynix's earnings miss cited as the catalyst.
- SanDisk is also named as a decliner, indicating broad-based sector contagion beyond the HBM-pure names.
- Framing as 'jitters' rather than a direct earnings event suggests sentiment contagion rather than fundamental repricing for Micron and Intel specifically.
- High confidence; all three watchlist names (MU, INTC, 000660.KS) are directly implicated.
